import string
import io

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(text)
    let trimmed = string.trim(text)
    match string.parse_int(trimmed)
    when Some(score)
      if score >= 90
        println("A")
      else if score >= 75
        println("B")
      else if score >= 60
        println("C")
      else
        println("F")
      end
      Ok(())
    when None
      Err("invalid input")
    end
  when None
    Err("no input")
  end
end
